session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the full results. Do not fix anything, just report the output.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
session.assistant:
**make fast-ci failed: Prettier check found 2 files with code style issues**
## Summary
The `make fast-ci` command exited with code 2 (failure). While most checks passed, the Prettier formatting check failed:
- **Linting**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1626 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: **Code style issues found in 2 files** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` - **Markdown Check**: Passed - **Exec Reference Check**: Passed - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5493 passed in 20.67s - **Unit Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 4.21s - **Unit Tests (erk-statusline)**: 112 passed in 0.80s - **Unit Tests (erkbot)**: 114 passed in 2.14s
The failures are in 2 markdown files that need Prettier formatting. All tests passed successfully (5855 total tests across all packages).
